args.Description: "Replace the static item selection dropdown in the Record Transit modal with a dynamic, searchable dropdown. This enables rapid lookup of items by name or code and auto-populates all relevant fields, improving the user experience for stores with large catalogs."
args.Instruction: "Replace static itemCode select with searchable combobox and add associated state/effect hooks"
args.toolAction: "Replacing static select dropdown with searchable combobox"
